scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix Backend && npm install --prefix Frontend
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "yellow.bold,cyan.bold" "npm run dev --prefix Backend" "npm run dev --prefix Frontend"
scripts.start: npx -y concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "yellow.bold,cyan.bold" "npm start --prefix Backend" "npm run dev --prefix Frontend"
